author: claude
text: The pen = the agent's territory: the subtree it's attached to and allowed to write in (pen as in sheep pen — visualized as the faint tint behind those bullets; hover the ⟡ glyph to see it). Replies you write inside it route to that agent automatically. Second jargon flag after trail — clearly the brief's internal names are leaking into the UI. I'll rename to plain words: scope or territory for pen, recently read for trail.
